articles.title: West Iceland Police Reach One Million Kilometers Using Tesla Model Y fleet
articles.description:
Tesla continues to gain popularity in the Police force across the world as West Iceland Police recorded travelling more than 1 million kilometers in their vehicles. According to the update shared on the Force’s Facebook […]

The post West Iceland Police Reach One Million Kilometers Using Tesla Model Y fleet appeared first on Drive Tesla.
articles.author: David Odejide
